sections.title: If the player has not paid for access to the upper level
Interacting with the hopper without paying for access

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.text: I don't think you should be using that without speaking to Percy first.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.text: Why, hello there, young'un. Did my boy Percy say you could come up here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I had to pay him to get access to this area.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.text: Ah, that's my Percy alright. I raised him well.
